Platform: square social product launch image
Canvas: 1080 x 1080 px
Aspect ratio: 1:1
Outer safe margin: at least 72 px from all canvas edges for essential text and logos
Preferred content width: keep primary text and CTA within 936 px
Minimum readable text size: 38 px for required supporting line and CTA, 48 px for launch message, 76 px for product name
CTA safe position: bottom zone or bottom safe area only; keep the CTA fully inside the outer safe margin
Logo safe position: upper-right only; keep the logo fully inside the outer safe margin
Background rule: avoid full-bleed red or red-dominant backgrounds; use blue, white, light neutral, or solar/green accents instead
Priority: platform_specs.txt overrides template.yaml for size, safe margins, CTA position, logo position, and minimum type sizes
